Information Event on the CFA Program and the Finance Sector

As part of our industry collaboration efforts, we welcomed Mr. İlke Takımoğlu Homriş, General Manager of the CFA Society of Istanbul, and Aslı Özok Ay, CFA Level 2 Candidate, to our university. Ms. Aslı gave an engaging presentation about her journey as a CFA program candidate, the experiences she gained, and how she applies the skills she acquired through the CFA program in her daily work at the Turkey Wealth Fund. Ms. Takımoğlu provided information to our students about the CFA Charterholder program, scholarships, the Investment Fundamentals Certificate, as well as other certifications offered by the CFA Institute and the activities of the CFA Society of Istanbul, and answered their questions.
